mapper.sql: id, user_id, `name`, description, cover_image, is_public, is_default, item_count, sort, created_at, updated_at

mapper.update:
update favorite_folder
user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cover_image = #{cover_image,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_public = #{is_public,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
